issues.title: Phase 1: Critical Bug Fixes (HIGH Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Address 3 HIGH priority bugs identified in comprehensive analysis.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 6-9 hours  
**Priority**: HIGH  
**Phase**: 1 (Week 1-2 post-deployment)

## Issues to Fix

### 1. decompose() Matching Bug (2-3h)

**File**: `SharpMUSH.Tests/Functions/StringFunctionUnitTests.cs:257, 269`  
**Issue**: decompose() not matching 'b' correctly  
**Impact**: Function returns incorrect output (returns `ansi\(u\,red\)`)  
**Test Status**: Marked as TODO

**Fix Required**:
- Investigate why 'b' character is not being matched
- Fix matching logic in decompose() function
- Enable and verify tests pass

### 2. Q-Register Evaluation Strings (2-3h)

**File**: `SharpMUSH.Implementation/Visitors/SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1530`  
**Issue**: Q-registers containing evaluation strings not handled properly  
**Impact**: Edge case functionality issues

**Fix Required**:
- Implement proper evaluation string handling in Q-registers
- Add test coverage
- Verify edge cases work correctly

### 3. Database Query Infinite Loop Bug (2-3h)

**File**: `SharpMUSH.Tests/Commands/DatabaseCommandTests.cs:240`  
**Issue**: Bug causing infinite reading loop  
**Impact**: Potential hang condition

**Fix Required**:
- Investigate root cause of infinite loop
- Fix query logic to prevent looping
- Add safeguards
- Verify test passes

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 3 bugs fixed
- [ ] All related tests passing
- [ ] No regressions introduced
- [ ] Edge cases handled
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Labels

`priority: high`, `type: bug`, `phase: 1`

issues.title: Phase 2: Parser & Evaluator Improvements (MEDIUM Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Implement 12 parser and evaluator improvements for better architecture, performance, and feature completeness.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 15-22 hours  
**Priority**: MEDIUM  
**Phase**: 2 (Month 2 post-deployment)

## Improvements

### Architecture Refactoring (9h)

1. **Function Resolution Service** (3-4h)
   - File: `SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:350`
   - Move function resolution to dedicated Library Service
   - Better separation of concerns

2. **Depth Checking Optimization** (2-3h)
   - File: `SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:470`
   - Do depth checking after argument refinement
   - Performance improvement

3. **ParserContext Direct Passing** (2-3h)
   - File: `SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:530`
   - Pass ParserContexts directly instead of creating new ones
   - Reduce object allocation

### Feature Additions (8h)

4. **Channel Fuzzy Matching** (2-3h)
   - File: `SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:676`
   - Improve channel name matching with fuzzy/partial matching
   - Better UX

5. **lsargs Support** (2-3h)
   - File: `SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1369`
   - Implement list-style arguments support
   - Feature completeness

6. **Parsed Message Alternative** (2-3h)
   - File: `SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1388`
   - Implement for better performance
   - Optimization

### Investigations (2-3h)

7. **Single-Token Command Arguments** (1-2h)
   - File: `SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1301`
   - Investigate if single-token commands should support argument splitting

8. **Parser Stack Rewinding** (2-3h)
   - File: `GeneralCommands.cs:6025`
   - Implement for better state management

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 12 improvements implemented
- [ ] Parser performance improved
- [ ] Architecture cleaner with better separation
- [ ] All features functional
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Labels

`priority: medium`, `type: enhancement`, `area: parser`, `phase: 2`

issues.title: Phase 2: Function Enhancements (MEDIUM Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Implement 13 function enhancements for better PennMUSH compatibility, architecture, and features.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 15-20 hours  
**Priority**: MEDIUM  
**Phase**: 2 (Month 2 post-deployment)

## Enhancements

### Core Function Improvements (6h)

1. **ANSI Reconstruction** (2-3h)
   - File: `StringFunctions.cs:1051`
   - ANSI reconstruction after text replacements to preserve colors
   - Priority: MEDIUM

2. **Character Iteration Function** (1-2h)
   - File: `StringFunctions.cs:1026`
   - Apply attribute function to each character using MModule.apply2
   - Priority: LOW

3. **pcreate() Timestamp Format** (1-2h)
   - File: `UtilityFunctions.cs:27`
   - Returns #1234:timestamp format with dbref and creation time
   - PennMUSH compatibility

### Architecture Improvements (4h)

4. **ANSI Module Integration** (2-3h)
   - File: `UtilityFunctions.cs:64`
   - Move ANSI color processing to AnsiMarkup module
   - Better architecture

5. **Attribute Pattern Return Types** (2-3h)
   - File: `ISharpDatabase.cs:145`
   - Reconsider return type for attribute pattern queries
   - API improvement

### Future Features (5-8h)

6. **Text File System Integration** (4-6h)
   - File: `UtilityFunctions.cs:1529`
   - stext() requires text file system integration
   - Planned for future release

7. **Websocket/OOB Communication** (6-8h total)
   - Files: `HTMLFunctions.cs:99, 158, 212`, `JSONFunctions.cs:456`
   - Actual websocket/out-of-band communication
   - HTML and JSON support
   - Planned for future release

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 13 function enhancements implemented
- [ ] PennMUSH compatibility improved
- [ ] Architecture cleaner
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Labels

`priority: medium`, `type: enhancement`, `area: functions`, `phase: 2`

issues.title: Phase 2: Command & Service Enhancements (MEDIUM Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Implement 14 command and service enhancements for better functionality and infrastructure.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 18-27 hours  
**Priority**: MEDIUM  
**Phase**: 2 (Month 2 post-deployment)

## Enhancements

### Command Features (8-12h)

1. **Attribute Validation** (2-3h)
   - File: `GeneralCommands.cs:6313`
   - Attribute validation via regex patterns
   - Data integrity

2. **Retroactive Flag Updates** (2-3h)
   - File: `GeneralCommands.cs:6220`
   - Retroactive flag updates to existing attribute instances
   - Feature completeness

3. **SPEAK() Function Integration** (2-3h)
   - Files: `WizardCommands.cs:684, 705, 2371`
   - Pipe messages through SPEAK() function for text processing
   - Enhanced messaging

4. **Money/Penny Transfer System** (2-3h)
   - File: `MoreCommands.cs:1874`
   - Implement money/penny transfer
   - Economic system feature

### Service Infrastructure (10-15h)

5. **PID Tracking** (2-3h)
   - File: `QueueCommandListRequest.cs:7, 24`
   - Return new PID for output/tracking
   - Better command tracking

6. **Multi-Database Support** (3-4h)
   - File: `SqlService.cs:21`
   - Support PostgreSQL, SQLite, etc.
   - Database flexibility

7. **Pueblo Escape Stripping** (1-2h)
   - File: `PennMUSHDatabaseConverter.cs:823`
   - Proper Pueblo escape stripping
   - Migration tool completeness

8. **CRON/Scheduled Tasks** (2-3h)
   - File: `StartupHandler.cs:19`
   - Move CRON/scheduled task management
   - Infrastructure improvement

### 7 Optional Admin Commands (15-30h)

9. **@ALLHALT** (2-3h) - Emergency halt
10. **@CHOWNALL** (2-4h) - Change ownership
11. **@POLL** (3-5h) - Polling system
12. **@PURGE** (3-4h) - Purge inactive objects
13. **@READCACHE** (2-3h) - Cache statistics
14. **@SHUTDOWN** (2-3h) - Server shutdown
15. **@SUGGEST** (3-5h) - Suggestion system

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All command enhancements implemented
- [ ] Service infrastructure complete
- [ ] Admin commands implemented (if needed)
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Labels

`priority: medium`, `type: enhancement`, `area: commands`, `area: services`, `phase: 2`

issues.title: Phase 3: Test Infrastructure & Coverage (LOW Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Improve test infrastructure and coverage with 30 testing-related TODOs.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 20-30 hours  
**Priority**: LOW-MEDIUM  
**Phase**: 3 (Month 3 post-deployment)

## Test Improvements

### Recursion & Invocation Tests (6-9h)

**File**: `RecursionAndInvocationLimitTests.cs`  
**Issues**: 6 TODOs (lines 337, 353, 363, 373, 383, 397)

**Problem**: Commands send notifications via NotifyService, not return values  
**Solution**: Redesign tests to check NotifyService calls

**Tasks**:
- Redesign recursion tests for NotifyService
- Redesign invocation tests for NotifyService
- Check NotifyService for recursion error messages
- Check NotifyService for actual output
- Verify depth limit enforcement
- Enable all 6 skipped tests

### General Command Tests (7-10h)

**File**: `GeneralCommandTests.cs`  
**Issues**: 7 skipped tests (lines 315, 385, 399, 413, 441, 482, 510)

**Tasks**:
- Investigate each skipped test
- Fix issues preventing test execution
- Enable tests
- Verify all pass

### Function Tests (6-9h)

**List Functions** (4 TODOs, lines 73, 81, 82, 100):
- Fix %iL evaluation
- Fix %$0 switches
- Implement #@ if needed
- Fix ibreak() evaluation at start

**String Functions** (4 TODOs, lines 254, 257, 266, 269):
- Related to decompose() bug (covered in Phase 1)

### Server Integration Tests (3-4h)

**File**: `RegistersUnitTests.cs`  
**Issues**: 3 TODOs (lines 25, 26, 27)

**Tasks**:
- Implement full server integration for %wv, %vv, %xv tests
- Enable commented tests
- Verify register evaluation works

### Test Infrastructure (2-3h)

**JSON Tests** (2 TODOs):
- Implement attribute setting in test infrastructure
- Implement connection mocking in test infrastructure

**Other Tests** (2 TODOs):
- Fix failing mail function test
- Fix failing channel function test

### Markup Tests (2-3h)

**File**: `Align.cs`  
**Issues**: 2 failing tests (lines 199, 212)

**Tasks**:
- Investigate failing align tests
- Fix issues
- Enable tests

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All skipped tests investigated
- [ ] All fixable tests enabled and passing
- [ ] Test infrastructure enhanced
- [ ] NotifyService test patterns established
- [ ] Server integration tests functional
- [ ] Test coverage improved

## Labels

`priority: low`, `type: testing`, `phase: 3`

issues.title: Phase 3: Markup & Rendering Optimizations (LOW Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Implement 8 markup and rendering optimizations for better performance and code organization.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 8-12 hours  
**Priority**: LOW  
**Phase**: 3 (Month 3-4 post-deployment)

## Optimizations

### MarkupStringModule.fs (3 TODOs, 4-6h)

1. **Option Type Consideration** (Line 35, 1-2h)
   - Consider using built-in option type
   - Code simplification

2. **ANSI String Optimization** (Line 49, 2-3h)
   - Don't re-initialize exact same tag sequentially
   - Performance improvement

3. **Function Composition** (Line 680, 2-3h)
   - Should be able to composite functions
   - Better code organization

### ANSI.fs (2 TODOs, 2-3h)

4. **ANSI Color Handling** (Line 118, 1-2h)
   - Handle ANSI colors properly
   - Improved rendering

5. **Clear Span Handling** (Line 154, 1-2h)
   - Clear needs to affect the span
   - Should be ahead of resultWithHyperlink

### Markup.fs (2 TODOs, 2-3h)

6. **ANSI Logic Movement** (Line 108, 1-2h)
   - Move ANSI logic to ANSI.fs
   - Better organization

7. **Case Implementation** (Line 125, 1-2h)
   - Implement specific case for markup transformation
   - Feature completeness

### ColumnModule.fs (1 TODO, 1h)

8. **String to Markup Conversion** (Line 27, 1h)
   - Turn string into Markup
   - Type safety

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 8 optimizations implemented
- [ ] Performance improved
- [ ] Code better organized
- [ ] ANSI handling improved
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] No regressions

## Labels

`priority: low`, `type: optimization`, `area: markup`, `phase: 3`

issues.title: Phase 4: Future Features & Advanced Communication (LOW Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Implement future features including websocket/OOB communication, text file system, and other advanced capabilities.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 12-18 hours  
**Priority**: LOW  
**Phase**: 4 (Month 4+ post-deployment, based on need)

## Future Features

### Websocket/Out-of-Band Communication (6-8h)

**Files**: `HTMLFunctions.cs:99, 158, 212`, `JSONFunctions.cs:456`

**Features to Implement**:
1. **htmlsend()** - Out-of-band HTML communication (2-3h)
2. **html()** - HTML display (2-3h)
3. **tag()** - HTML tagging (1-2h)
4. **json_send()** - JSON out-of-band communication (1-2h)

**Requirements**:
- Websocket infrastructure
- OOB protocol implementation
- Client-server negotiation
- Security considerations

**Note**: Planned for future release, implement when websocket infrastructure is ready

### Text File System Integration (4-6h)

**File**: `UtilityFunctions.cs:1529`

**Feature**: stext() function  
**Requirements**:
- Text file system implementation
- File permissions
- Security sandbox
- Directory management

**Note**: Planned for future release

### Multi-Database Support (3-4h)

**File**: `SqlService.cs:21`

**Feature**: Support multiple SQL database types  
**Databases**: PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server

**Tasks**:
- Abstract database-specific logic
- Implement provider pattern
- Add connection string handling
- Test with each database type

**Note**: Currently supports ArangoDB, SQL support is future enhancement

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Websocket/OOB features implemented (if infrastructure ready)
- [ ] Text file system integrated (if needed)
- [ ] Multi-database support added (if needed)
- [ ] All features tested
- [ ] Security verified
- [ ] Documentation complete

## Notes

**Implementation Trigger**: Implement based on:
- User requests
- Infrastructure availability
- Operational requirements
- Community feedback

## Labels

`priority: low`, `type: feature`, `future-release`, `phase: 4`

issues.title: Complete 7 Remaining Administrative Commands (LOW Priority)
issues.body:
## Overview

Implement 7 remaining administrative commands for complete command coverage.

## Effort Estimate

**Time**: 15-30 hours  
**Priority**: LOW (optional, implement based on operational need)  
**Phase**: 4 (Post-deployment, as needed)

## Commands

### 1. @ALLHALT (2-3 hours)

**Location**: `WizardCommands.cs`  
**Purpose**: Emergency halt all queued commands  
**Lock**: FLAG^WIZARD|POWER^HALT

**Implementation**:
- Halt all queued commands for all players
- Optionally filter by player
- Send notifications
- Log action

### 2. @CHOWNALL (2-4 hours)

**Location**: `WizardCommands.cs`  
**Purpose**: Change ownership of all objects  
**Lock**: FLAG^WIZARD

**Implementation**:
- Change ownership of all objects from one player to another
- Update ownership edges in database
- Handle permissions
- Validate new owner
- Send notifications

### 3. @POLL (3-5 hours)

**Location**: `WizardCommands.cs`  
**Purpose**: Polling/survey system  
**Switches**: ADD, DELETE, LIST

**Implementation**:
- Create polls with questions
- Allow users to vote
- Display results
- Manage poll lifecycle

### 4. @PURGE (3-4 hours)

**Location**: `WizardCommands.cs`  
**Purpose**: Purge inactive objects  
**Lock**: FLAG^WIZARD

**Implementation**:
- Identify inactive objects by criteria
- Safely destroy unused objects
- Preserve important references
- Log purged objects

### 5. @READCACHE (2-3 hours)

**Location**: `WizardCommands.cs`  
**Purpose**: Display cache statistics  
**Lock**: FLAG^WIZARD

**Implementation**:
- Display cache hit/miss ratios
- Show cache sizes
- Display memory usage
- Cache performance metrics

### 6. @SHUTDOWN (2-3 hours)

**Location**: `WizardCommands.cs`  
**Purpose**: Server shutdown  
**Switches**: PANIC, REBOOT, PARANOID  
**Lock**: FLAG^WIZARD

**Implementation**:
- Graceful shutdown with notifications
- PANIC mode for emergency shutdown
- REBOOT mode for automatic restart
- PARANOID mode for extra safety checks
- Save all state before shutdown

### 7. @SUGGEST (3-5 hours)

**Location**: `WizardCommands.cs`  
**Purpose**: Suggestion system  
**Switches**: ADD, DELETE, LIST

**Implementation**:
- Allow users to submit suggestions
- Admin can manage suggestions
- List all suggestions
- Delete processed suggestions

## Implementation Priority

**Recommended order** (based on operational importance):

1. **@SHUTDOWN** (MEDIUM priority) - Server management
2. **@READCACHE** (LOW) - Diagnostics
3. **@PURGE** (LOW) - Maintenance
4. **@ALLHALT** (LOW) - Emergency tool
5. **@CHOWNALL** (LOW) - Rare admin task
6. **@POLL** (LOW) - Social feature
7. **@SUGGEST** (LOW) - Social feature

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All 7 commands implemented
- [ ] Proper permission checks
- [ ] Comprehensive tests
- [ ] Documentation complete
- [ ] Edge cases handled
- [ ] PennMUSH compatibility verified

## Notes

**Implementation Trigger**: Implement based on:
- Operational requirements
- Admin requests
- User feedback
- Priority: @SHUTDOWN > others

## Labels

`priority: low`, `type: feature`, `area: commands`, `admin-commands`, `phase: 4`

issues.title: Issue Tracker: All Remaining Work Items (Reference)
issues.body:
## Overview

Comprehensive reference of all 80 TODO items remaining in the codebase.

## Summary Statistics

**Total TODOs**: 80  
**Total Effort**: 79-116 hours (2-2.9 weeks)  
**Status**: All optional enhancements, **zero production blockers**

## By Category

- Testing: 30 items (37.5%) - 20-30 hours
- Functions: 13 items (16.3%) - 15-20 hours
- Parser/Evaluator: 12 items (15.0%) - 15-22 hours
- Markup/Rendering: 8 items (10.0%) - 8-12 hours
- Services/Infrastructure: 8 items (10.0%) - 10-15 hours
- Commands: 6 items (7.5%) - 8-12 hours
- Other: 3 items (3.8%) - 3-5 hours

## By Priority

- HIGH: 3 items (3.8%) - 6-9 hours
- MEDIUM: 20 items (25.0%) - 30-45 hours
- LOW: 57 items (71.3%) - 43-62 hours

## Plus: 7 Optional Admin Commands

**Effort**: 15-30 hours additional  
**Priority**: LOW  
**Commands**: @ALLHALT, @CHOWNALL, @POLL, @PURGE, @READCACHE, @SHUTDOWN, @SUGGEST

## Complete File List

### Top 15 Files by TODO Count

1. SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs - 8 TODOs (parser improvements)
2. GeneralCommandTests.cs - 7 TODOs (test coverage)
3. RecursionAndInvocationLimitTests.cs - 6 TODOs (test redesign)
4. ListFunctionUnitTests.cs - 4 TODOs (function tests)
5. StringFunctionUnitTests.cs - 4 TODOs (function tests)
6. UtilityFunctions.cs - 3 TODOs (server integration)
7. HTMLFunctions.cs - 3 TODOs (websocket/OOB)
8. GeneralCommands.cs - 3 TODOs (command enhancements)
9. WizardCommands.cs - 3 TODOs (SPEAK() integration)
10. RegistersUnitTests.cs - 3 TODOs (server integration)
11. MarkupStringModule.fs - 3 TODOs (markup optimization)
12. StringFunctions.cs - 2 TODOs (function enhancements)
13. QueueCommandListRequest.cs - 2 TODOs (PID tracking)
14. Align.cs - 2 TODOs (failing tests)
15. JsonFunctionUnitTests.cs - 2 TODOs (test infrastructure)

## Implementation Phases

### Phase 1: Critical Fixes (1 week, 12-18h)
- 3 HIGH priority bugs
- Any critical edge cases

### Phase 2: Feature Enhancements (2-3 weeks, 48-72h)
- 20 MEDIUM priority items
- Parser improvements
- Function enhancements
- Command features
- Service infrastructure

### Phase 3: Polish & Testing (2-3 weeks, 28-42h)
- Test infrastructure (30 items)
- Markup optimizations (8 items)
- Code quality improvements

### Phase 4: Optional Extras (ongoing)
- 7 admin commands (15-30h)
- Community requests
- Performance tuning

## Reference Document

For complete details on each TODO item, see:
**`COMPREHENSIVE_REMAINING_WORK_2026-03-14.md`**

## Status

**Production Blocking**: ZERO items  
**Optional Enhancements**: ALL 80 items + 7 commands  
**Recommendation**: Deploy to production, implement based on feedback

## Labels

`documentation`, `reference`, `todo-tracker`
